overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval village and countryside. The character passes stone castle walls, wooden houses, crosses a stone bridge over water, and continues along dirt paths through blooming rural landscapes under a bright sunny sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval castle approach with cobblestone path

events.description: passes by a guard standing on the right side of the path
screen fades to black indicating a scene cut or time skip

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the castle walls with swords on his back

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing with weapon, watching the path

entered.detail: tall medieval stone fortification with red tiled roofs and towers
irregular stone paving stones forming the walkway
tall white-barked trees with green foliage
simple wooden post fence along the path edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a cobblestone path approaching a large medieval stone castle with red roofs. He passes a guard standing on the right side before the screen fades to black at the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts with wooden houses and stone walls

events.description: fade from black reveals new village area with wooden houses and different lighting
passes a guard standing by a wooden fence on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path through the village outskirts, passing wooden houses and vegetation

notable_agents.action: guard standing by wooden fence overlooking the path

entered.detail: dark wooden hut with steep thatched roof
low stone retaining wall along the path

segments.scene_description: After a brief fade, the scene reveals a village path lined with wooden houses on the left and stone walls on the right. Geralt passes another guard standing by a fence as the path continues toward a distant river.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone bridge crossing over river with wooden railings

events.description: steps onto the stone bridge with wooden railings and begins ascending
reaches the apex of the bridge and begins descending toward the far bank

agents.ego_description: walking up and over the arched stone bridge, looking at the water below and distant scenery

notable_agents.action: archer with bow standing on the bridge looking out over the water

entered.detail: arched cobblestone bridge with wooden railings crossing the river
calm blue water visible beneath and beside the bridge
dark wooden posts and rails along bridge edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a stone bridge with wooden railings over a river, ascending to the apex then descending. An archer stands on the left side of the bridge looking out over the water as the character makes the crossing.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural countryside with blooming orchards and dirt paths

events.description: exits the bridge onto a dirt path surrounded by flowering white trees and open fields

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt path through the blooming countryside, moving away from the village into open nature

entered.detail: unpaved earth trail winding through grass and flowers
trees covered in white blossoms lining the path
small rustic structure with thatched roof

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, Geralt walks along a dirt path through open countryside. White blooming trees line the route and a small wooden hut sits to the left as the landscape opens up to distant mountains and forests.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that begins within the fortified walls of a medieval castle and gradually opens into a bright, blooming countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a cobblestone path toward a large stone castle with red roofs, passing a guard before the view shifts to a village path lined with wooden houses and stone walls. As the character continues past another guard by a fence, the scene transitions toward a river where he crosses a stone bridge with wooden railings, passing an archer stationed at the edge. The path then evolves from stone to dirt as Geralt exits the bridge and enters the open rural landscape. Finally, the environment expands to reveal white blooming trees and a small wooden hut, leading the eye toward distant mountains and forests under a clear sky.
